task_completion.description: The 'data-models' project is opened in IntelliJ IDEA.
task_completion.visual_evidence: IntelliJ IDEA window is visible with 'data-models' displayed in the Project tool window on the left.

task_completion.description: Constructor, getters/setters, equals(), hashCode(), and toString() methods are generated for the Person class.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The editor shows Person.java with a constructor taking all 4 fields, get/set methods for all 4 fields, and equals/hashCode/toString methods referencing firstName, lastName, age, and email.

task_completion.description: Constructor, getters/setters, equals(), hashCode(), and toString() methods are generated for the Address class.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The editor shows Address.java with a constructor taking all 5 fields, get/set methods for all 5 fields, and equals/hashCode/toString methods referencing street, city, state, zipCode, and country.

task_completion.description: Constructor, getters/setters, equals(), hashCode(), and toString() methods are generated for the Order class.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The editor shows Order.java with a constructor taking all 5 fields, get/set methods for all 5 fields, and equals/hashCode/toString methods referencing orderId, customerName, items, totalAmount, and orderDate.

task_completion.description: The project compiles successfully after the code generation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Build' tool window at the bottom of IntelliJ IDEA shows a successful build message (e.g., 'Build completed successfully' with a green checkmark) or a successful Maven build output.

integrity.description: The agent used IntelliJ IDEA to edit the files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The code modifications are visible within the IntelliJ IDEA editor tabs, not in an external text editor like nano, vim, or gedit.

integrity.description: The agent used IntelliJ's built-in code generation features rather than pasting pre-written code.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should ideally show the 'Generate' menu (Alt+Insert) or dialog boxes for selecting fields to include in constructors, getters/setters, equals/hashCode, and toString.

integrity.description: The compilation was genuinely executed within the IDE or via a legitimate terminal command.
integrity.visual_evidence: The build output appears in IntelliJ's native Build/Run tool window or a genuine terminal running 'mvn compile' or 'javac', rather than a spoofed text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project is located at /home/ga/IdeaProjects/data-models. The Person class has 4 fields: firstName, lastName, age, email. The Address class has 5 fields: street, city, state, zipCode, country. The Order class has 5 fields: orderId, customerName, items, totalAmount, orderDate. Verify that the generated methods in each class utilize all of their respective fields.
